user.title: VoIP Stack
user.description: SIP endpoint, bridge/router and local registrar for ESPHome VoIP phones. HA listens on SIP UDP and TCP automatically.

data_description.sip_port: Listen port for the HA SIP endpoint. HA accepts SIP signaling over both UDP and TCP on this port.
data_description.rtp_port: Base RTP UDP port for HA media and relays.
data_description.advertise_host: Optional override published in ESP phonebooks. Use this when HA is behind routing, NAT, LXC, VPN, or multiple subnets and the automatically announced address is not reachable by ESP devices.
data_description.assist_intents: Register optional Assist handlers for call, hang up, answer and decline ("Hey Jarvis, call Kitchen"). Spoken contact names are resolved dynamically against the live VoIP phonebook.
data_description.debug_mode: Expose detailed SIP/RTP/media diagnostics in HA softphone snapshots and event bus, and emit additional debug logs for call investigation.
data_description.sip_registrar_enabled: Accept REGISTER from local SIP endpoints such as VoIP phones, Zoiper, Linphone or baresip using accounts managed by VoIP Stack services.
data_description.ring_group_fallback: What HA does when no member answers a ring group before timeout. Reject returns 480; answer_ha rings the HA softphone.
data_description.ha_ring_group: Optional ring group membership for the Home Assistant softphone only.
data_description.ha_conference_group: Optional conference group membership for the Home Assistant softphone only.
data_description.ha_conference_ring: When enabled, HA rings when another participant starts the configured conference group.
data_description.trunk_enabled: Show provider/PBX trunk settings. When disabled, no trunk registration, external route or DTMF collector starts.

trunk.title: Optional SIP Trunk
trunk.description: Register Home Assistant to one provider/PBX trunk for external outbound calls and inbound DTMF routing.

data_description.trunk_transport: SIP transport used from HA to the provider.
data_description.trunk_domain: Optional SIP realm/domain. Defaults to the trunk server when empty.
data_description.trunk_username: SIP account user and default incoming Request-URI user.
data_description.trunk_auth_username: Digest auth username when different from the SIP username.
data_description.trunk_outbound_proxy: Optional proxy host or sip:host:port used as signaling next hop.
data_description.trunk_inbound_default_target: Local phonebook target used when no DTMF route resolves. Use HA for the HA softphone.
data_description.trunk_dtmf_enabled: Collect RFC2833/telephone-event digits after answering inbound trunk calls.
data_description.trunk_dtmf_timeout_ms: Digit collection window after pre-answer. Default is 3 seconds, maximum is 10 seconds. Set 0 to skip DTMF/pre-answer and let the normal inbound dialplan decide; without an automation override, the HA softphone rings directly.
data_description.trunk_dtmf_terminator: Optional terminator digit such as #. Empty means timeout or exact route match decides.
data_description.trunk_dtmf_routes: One route per line using digits=target, for example 100=Kitchen.

error.trunk_dtmf_routes_invalid: DTMF routes must use one digits=target entry per line.
